tc_171.question: Brooks Robinson and Carl Yastrzemski hold the major league baseball record for playing the greatest number of seasons with the same team. How many years did they play-- and with what teams? Respond with the answer only, without any explanation.
responses:
Brooks Robinson: 23 seasons, Baltimore Orioles
Carl Yastrzemski: 23 seasons, Boston Red Sox
23, Baltimore Orioles for Brooks Robinson, and Boston Red Sox for Carl Yastrzemski.
Brooks Robinson played 23 seasons with the Baltimore Orioles, and Carl Yastrzemski played 23 seasons with the Boston Red Sox.
23 with the Baltimore Orioles and Boston Red Sox respectively.
Brooks Robinson played 23 seasons with the Baltimore Orioles and Carl Yastrzemski played 23 seasons with the Boston Red Sox.
23 with Baltimore Orioles (Robinson) and Boston Red Sox (Yastrzemski)
Brooks Robinson played 23 seasons with the Baltimore Orioles and Carl Yastrzemski played 23 seasons with the Boston Red Sox.
23, Baltimore Orioles and Boston Red Sox respectively
ground_truth: 23 years. Third baseman Robinson played with the Baltimore Orioles from 1955 to 1977; Carl Yastrzemski, outfielder/first baseman, played with the Boston Red Sox from 1961 to 1983
23 years third baseman robinson played with baltimore orioles from 1955 to 1977 carl yastrzemski outfielder first baseman played with boston red sox from 1961 to 1983
